final_prompt.prompt:
Create a premium packaging design mockup for a high-end organic matcha product line, arranged as a commercial product display.

Style/medium: commercial product photography meets editorial packaging design render, photorealistic still life with soft studio lighting
Composition: top-down 3/4 angle, four products arranged in a neat grid on light wood surface, medium format product shot
Subject: four matcha products—matcha powder tin, matcha chocolate box, matcha cookie tin, matcha tea bag box—each with matte paper packaging
Scene/backdrop: light natural wood tabletop, fresh green tea leaves and matcha powder scattered as decorative props, clean minimal background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light from upper left, gentle shadows, fresh and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: layered matcha greens as dominant, warm off-white and gold accents, natural wood undertones
Materials/textures: matte paper packaging with subtle Japanese traditional pattern embossing, delicate hand-drawn matcha tea garden illustrations with clean elegant lines
Text (verbatim): "产品名称采用中英日三语排版"
Constraints: packaging must display serif and handwritten font combinations; traditional Japanese patterns as subtle background texture; suitable for luxury gift market positioning
Avoid: glossy plastic textures, neon colors, cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
